creator: lists@nrd.fr
text:
Hi,
 
 I have the same problem on an AMD64 box using unixODBC for SQLite. The
 complete setup is as follows :
 
 - FreeBSD 7.0 RELEASE for AMD64
 - OpenOffice 2.4.0  (installed from binary package)
 - sqlite3-3.5.6     (installed from ports)
 - unixODBC-2.2.12_4 (installed from ports)
 - sqliteodbc-0.77   (installed from sources)
 
 I had a previous OpenOffice/SQLite installation on FreeBSD 6.1 RELEASE
 that worked with no problem on an older i386 (32 bits) plateform.
 
 Regards.
 
 -- 
 Benat Dagorret
